text.title: HTTP Server Patterns
text.summary: Native Bun.serve for maximum performance and Hono framework for production APIs with routing, middleware, and validation.

rule.statement: Use Bun.serve for simple APIs or scripts that need maximum throughput; export the config object as default.
rule.rationale: Bun.serve is the lowest-overhead HTTP layer; exporting as default lets Bun auto-detect the server entry point.

rule.statement: Use Hono for production APIs that need routing, middleware, and Zod validation; export the app as a default object with port and fetch.
rule.rationale: Hono runs on Bun natively and is 5x faster than Express; its zValidator middleware colocates schema and handler, reducing boilerplate.
